title: Private Handoff Acceptance Package v5.8
recommendedDecision: Use v5.8 as the private owner acceptance layer after v5.7 handoff. Accept, hold, or block each owner action, custody item, repeat gate, public line, launch lock, decision option, and export packet. Do not schedule repeat P0 testing, prepare a limited private pilot decision, grant provider real-record access, send outbound email, run official Toastmasters workflows, or open live Decidim until v5.8 acceptance and all previous private gates pass.
acceptanceRule: Use v5.8 after the v5.7 handoff packet is assembled to privately accept, hold, or block each owner action, custody item, repeat-run gate, public release line, launch lock, and export packet; it is an acceptance control layer, not pilot approval.
signoffRule: Every P0 owner acceptance must have an accepted owner or alternate, private evidence reference, custody acceptance, repeat impact, and public-safe line before it can count toward repeat P0 eligibility.
repeatRule: Repeat P0 scheduling remains blocked while any P0 acceptance, custody item, provider boundary, authority minute, privacy signoff, IDS/data signoff, public-release line, launch lock, or export packet is blocked or held.
launchBlockRule: Limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, and live Decidim access remain blocked until v5.8 acceptance is privately signed, v5.7 handoff is accepted, v5.6 session minute is accepted, v5.5 owner closeout passes, and the repeat P0 run also passes privately.
